vocabulary.example_sentence: Every learner in our English club shares one useful tip each week.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 英语俱乐部里每位学习者每周分享一条实用技巧。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She made flashcards for the twenty hardest words in Unit 3.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她为第三单元里最难的二十个词做了抽认卡。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our group project is to record a short English podcast.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的小组项目是录制一段简短的英语播客。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This website offers free listening exercises for beginners.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个网站为初学者提供免费听力练习。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The hands-on activity helped us remember new grammar faster.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这次动手活动帮助我们更快记住新语法。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We ran a small experiment to see which study method worked best.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们做了一个小实验，看哪种学习方法最有效。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Look up any word you do not know while reading aloud.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 朗读时遇到不认识的词就查一查。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Keep a dictionary open when you write your first draft.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 写初稿时把词典放在手边。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Reading aloud for ten minutes improved my pronunciation.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 大声朗读十分钟改善了我的发音。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We practised the dialogue in pairs before class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 课前我们两人一组练习了这段对话。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Short videos suit learners who have only fifteen minutes a day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 短视频适合每天只有十五分钟的学习者。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In general, daily review beats one long session on Sunday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 总的来说，每天复习胜过周日一次长跑。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In general, learners who write notes remember more.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 总的来说，做笔记的学习者记得更多。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do not speed through the text without understanding it.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 不要不求甚解地快速读完课文。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Grammar becomes easier when you see it in real sentences.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在真实句子里看语法会更容易。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I listen to one English podcast on my way to school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 上学路上我会听一集英语播客。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Start from zero shame—every expert was once a beginner.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 从零开始不必羞愧——专家也曾是新手。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I came across a helpful article about memory techniques.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我偶然看到一篇关于记忆技巧的有用文章。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Learn new words step by step instead of cramming fifty at once.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新词要循序渐进地学，不要一次硬背五十个。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Reading a little each night will build up your vocabulary.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每晚读一点会逐步积累你的词汇量。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Actively ask questions when you do not understand a rule.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 不懂规则时要主动提问。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Finding an enjoyable book makes study feel less like work.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 找到一本有趣的书会让学习不那么像苦差。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My best strategy is to review flashcards before breakfast.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我最好的策略是早饭前复习抽认卡。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do not put off your speaking practice until the night before the test.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 别把口语练习拖到考试前一晚。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Check whether your answer is correct before moving on.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 先确认答案是否正确再继续。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The teacher suggests we record ourselves and listen back.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 老师建议我们录下自己的朗读再回听。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Try another method if copying words ten times bores you.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 如果抄写十遍让你厌烦，就换种方法。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Summarize each paragraph in one sentence in your notebook.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在笔记本里用一句话概括每一段。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Steady growth matters more than a perfect score on one quiz.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 稳步进步比一次测验满分更重要。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A growth mindset helps you learn from mistakes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 成长型思维帮你从错误中学习。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Choose study material that matches your current level.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 选择与你当前水平匹配的学习材料。

vocabulary.example_sentence: His success came in part from reading every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他的成功部分来自每天阅读。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Ask the teacher for guidance on how to plan your review.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 向老师请教如何规划复习。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Useful feedback tells you exactly what to improve.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有用的反馈会明确指出该改进什么。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In addition to the textbook, we use online quizzes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 除了课本，我们还用在线小测。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In addition, we keep a list of words we often misspell.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 此外，我们还列了一张常拼错词的清单。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The school library is a quiet resource for self-study.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学校图书馆是自学的好资源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mark new words in the textbook as you read each unit.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 读每个单元时在课本里标出新词。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bilingual subtitles give you an advantage when watching films.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 双语字幕让你看电影时更有优势。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Take advantage of the free tutoring hour after school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 利用课后免费的辅导时间。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Plan your tasks so you can study efficiently after dinner.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 规划好任务，以便晚饭后高效学习。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The story described a quiet valley where the boy read every evening.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 故事描写了一个男孩每晚读书的安静山谷。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Slow down and focus on pronunciation when you read aloud.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 朗读时放慢速度，专注发音。

vocabulary.chinese: （用鼠标或在触摸板上）点击；（使）发出咔嗒声
vocabulary.example_sentence: Click the speaker icon to hear the word again.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 点击喇叭图标再听一遍单词。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She borrowed an English magazine from the reading corner.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她从阅读角借了一本英语杂志。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Travel can open up new reasons to learn a language.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 旅行会让人更有动力学语言。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Put finished workbooks on the top shelf of your desk.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把做完的练习册放在书桌顶层。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Finish schoolwork early so you have time for extra reading.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 早点完成作业，才有时间额外阅读。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Print the checklist and tick each task you complete.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 打印清单，完成一项勾一项。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Skim the headlines in an English newspaper every morning.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每天早晨浏览英文报纸标题。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The e-book lets you look up words with one tap.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电子书让你一点就能查词。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A recent study shows short breaks help memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最近一项研究表明短暂休息有助于记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Frank shared his note-taking system with the class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗兰克向全班分享了他的笔记方法。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Some classmates take HSK while also preparing for English exams.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有些同学在准备英语考试的同时也考汉语水平考试。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Cathy leads our weekly pronunciation practice group.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 凯茜带领我们每周的发音练习小组。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Terry posted a list of useful learning websites on the board.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 特里在布告栏上贴了一份有用的学习网站清单。
